untranslatable_reason: BARR pattern requires identification of trend lines, parallel warning/sell lines, and price piercing through sell line. These are geometric/structural pattern elements that cannot be expressed using only the allowed price-action and technical indicators (RSI, MACD, ATR, Bollinger Bands, etc.). The pattern requires custom line detection, slope calculation, and intersection logic not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal describes a reversal pattern with trend line geometry and parallel lines. The core mechanics (price piercing a sell line moving downward for bearish reversal, ~40% average decline) suggest a SHORT entry on downward price movement and exit on reversal. However, without access to trend line detection and geometric pattern recognition indicators, the precise entry/exit conditions cannot be accurately translated. A basic short entry on price decline and exit on reversal is provided as a placeholder, but this does not capture the BARR pattern's true mechanics.
